report.summary: UX-audited and polished 2 new learn guides (veTokenomics & Delta-Neutral Yield), created 2 OG images, fixed hydration errors from nested Link/a tags, added missing FAQ structured data, and improved mobile table scrollability.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed nested <a> inside <Link> hydration error in Related Articles section of both pages — removed inner <a> tags, moved styles to <Link> component directly (Next.js 13+ compatibility)
Added minWidth: 700px to veTokenomics comparison table for proper mobile horizontal scroll behavior
Added minWidth: 650px to Delta-Neutral strategy comparison table for proper mobile horizontal scroll behavior
Added missing FAQ structured data (generateFAQSchema + combineSchemas) to veTokenomics page — 6 FAQ items now included in JSON-LD for Google rich snippets
Both pages confirmed to have: Breadcrumb navigation, BackToTop component, Table of Contents, responsive hero with clamp() font sizing, dark theme consistency, overflow-x scroll wrappers on tables

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-vetokenomics-curve-wars-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme, signature gradient accent bar, lock/governance motif, bold title text readable at thumbnail size
OG image: og-delta-neutral-yield-strategies-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme, signature gradient accent bar, balance/scales motif, bold title text readable at thumbnail size
